command:
INIT=$(node ~/.claude/get-shit-done/bin/gsd-tools.cjs init plan-phase 6 2>/dev/null)
if [[ "$INIT" == @file:* ]]; then INIT=$(cat "${INIT#@file:}"); fi
echo "$INIT"

cd "C:/Code/MultiRotter" && node "$HOME/.claude/get-shit-done/bin/gsd-tools.cjs" commit "docs(06): create headlines page phase plan" --files ".planning/phases/06-headlines-page/06-01-PLAN.md" ".planning/phases/06-headlines-page/06-02-PLAN.md" ".planning/ROADMAP.md" 2>&1

INIT=$(node ~/.claude/get-shit-done/bin/gsd-tools.cjs init execute-phase 6 2>/dev/null)
if [[ "$INIT" == @file:* ]]; then INIT=$(cat "${INIT#@file:}"); fi
echo "$INIT"

# Update STATE.md for phase start
node ~/.claude/get-shit-done/bin/gsd-tools.cjs state begin-phase --phase "06" --name "headlines-page" --plans "2" 2>/dev/null && echo "STATE UPDATED"
# Get plan index
node ~/.claude/get-shit-done/bin/gsd-tools.cjs phase-plan-index "06" 2>/dev/null
cd C:/Code/MultiRotter && git add src/components/headlines/HeadlineRow.test.tsx && git commit --no-verify -m "test(06-01): add failing tests for HeadlineRow component and getHeadlineIconType"

cd C:/Code/MultiRotter && grep -c "getHeadlineIconType" src/components/headlines/HeadlineRow.tsx && grep -c 'width="70%"' src/components/headlines/HeadlineRow.tsx && grep -c "thread-fire.svg" src/components/headlines/HeadlineRow.tsx && grep -c "thread-camera.svg" src/components/headlines/HeadlineRow.tsx && grep -c "thread-normal.svg" src/components/headlines/HeadlineRow.tsx && grep -c "#FDFDFD" src/components/headlines/HeadlineRow.tsx && grep -c "#eeeeee" src/components/headlines/HeadlineRow.tsx

cd C:/Code/MultiRotter && git add src/components/headlines/HeadlineRow.tsx src/components/headlines/HeadlineRow.module.css src/components/headlines/HeadlineRow.test.tsx src/components/headlines/index.ts && git commit --no-verify -m "feat(06-01): implement HeadlineRow component with icon type classification

- HeadlineRow renders 4-column tr (icon, title@70%, time+date, author)
- getHeadlineIconType classifies threads as normal/fire/camera
- Fire: scoops with security-alert titles or viewCount >
cd C:/Code/MultiRotter && npx jest src/components/headlines/ --no-coverage 2>&1 | tail -10

cd C:/Code/MultiRotter && node "C:/Users/esken/.claude/get-shit-done/bin/gsd-tools.cjs" state add-decision --phase "06-headlines-page" --summary "Inline hex values for row backgrounds in HeadlineRow (jsdom cannot resolve CSS custom properties)" 2>&1 && node "C:/Users/esken/.claude/get-shit-done/bin/gsd-tools.cjs" state add-decision --phase "06-headlines-page" --summary "@testing-library/jest-dom imported per-file in HeadlineRow.test.tsx (no global setup in jest.config.js)" 2>&1
cd C:/Code/MultiRotter && node "C:/Users/esken/.claude/get-shit-done/bin/gsd-tools.cjs" state record-session --stopped-at "Completed 06-01-PLAN.md: HeadlineRow component with 25 tests passing" 2>&1
cd C:/Code/MultiRotter && node "C:/Users/esken/.claude/get-shit-done/bin/gsd-tools.cjs" requirements mark-complete HDLN-01 HDLN-03 2>&1

cd C:/Code/MultiRotter && git add .planning/phases/06-headlines-page/06-01-SUMMARY.md .planning/STATE.md .planning/ROADMAP.md .planning/REQUIREMENTS.md && git commit --no-verify -m "docs(06-01): complete HeadlineRow component plan

- HeadlineRow 4-column tr component with icon classification
- getHeadlineIconType classifies normal/fire/camera
- 25 tests passing, all acceptance criteria met"
cd C:/Code/MultiRotter && git add src/components/headlines/HeadlinesTable.test.tsx && git commit --no-verify -m "test(06-02): add failing tests for HeadlinesTable sort toggle and rendering"
cd C:/Code/MultiRotter && npx jest src/components/headlines/HeadlinesTable.test.tsx --no-coverage --verbose 2>&1 | grep -E "(PASS|FAIL|✓|✗|×|●|√)" | head -20
cd C:/Code/MultiRotter && npx jest src/components/headlines/HeadlinesTable.test.tsx --no-coverage --verbose 2>&1 | grep -E "(✓|✗|×|✕|PASS|FAIL|pass|fail|√|●)" | head -30

cd C:/Code/MultiRotter && grep -c "use client" src/components/headlines/HeadlinesTable.tsx && grep -c "sortMode" src/components/headlines/HeadlinesTable.tsx && grep -c "#71B7E6" src/components/headlines/HeadlinesTable.tsx && grep -c "#ff6600" src/components/headlines/HeadlinesTable.module.css && grep -c "Chronological" src/components/headlines/HeadlinesTable.tsx && grep -c "By Last Reply" src/components/headlines/HeadlinesTable.tsx && grep -c "HeadlineRow" src/components/headlines/HeadlinesTable

cd C:/Code/MultiRotter && git add src/components/headlines/HeadlinesTable.tsx src/components/headlines/HeadlinesTable.module.css src/components/headlines/HeadlinesTable.test.tsx && git commit --no-verify -m "feat(06-02): add HeadlinesTable with sort toggle and 4-column thread table

- 'use client' component with chronological/lastReply sort toggle
- Sort by date+time descending using toSortableDate() helper
- h1 title updates based on active sort mode
- Blue #71B7E6 header row with white Titles/
cd C:/Code/MultiRotter && git add src/components/headlines/HeadlinesPageLayout.test.tsx && git commit --no-verify -m "test(06-02): add failing tests for HeadlinesPageLayout two-column structure"
cd C:/Code/MultiRotter && npx jest src/components/headlines/ --no-coverage --verbose 2>&1 | tail -20

cd C:/Code/MultiRotter && echo "=== Acceptance Criteria ===" && echo "HeadlinesPageLayout in index.ts:" && grep -c "HeadlinesPageLayout" src/components/headlines/index.ts && echo "HeadlinesTable in index.ts:" && grep -c "HeadlinesTable" src/components/headlines/index.ts && echo "160 in HeadlinesPageLayout:" && grep -c "160" src/components/headlines/HeadlinesPageLayout.tsx && echo "FORUM_SEED in page.tsx:" && grep -c "FORUM_SEED" src/app/headlines/page.tsx && echo "HeaderBar in page.tsx:" && grep
cd C:/Code/MultiRotter && npx next build --webpack 2>&1 | tail -20

cd C:/Code/MultiRotter && git add src/components/headlines/HeadlinesPageLayout.tsx src/components/headlines/HeadlinesPageLayout.module.css src/components/headlines/HeadlinesPageLayout.test.tsx src/components/headlines/index.ts src/app/headlines/page.tsx && git commit --no-verify -m "feat(06-02): add HeadlinesPageLayout, route page, update barrel export

- HeadlinesPageLayout: two-column table with 160px sidebar and main content
- Ad placeholder in sidebar (160x600 dashed box)
- src/app/headlines

cd C:/Code/MultiRotter && test -f "src/components/headlines/HeadlinesTable.tsx" && echo "FOUND: HeadlinesTable.tsx" || echo "MISSING: HeadlinesTable.tsx" && test -f "src/components/headlines/HeadlinesPageLayout.tsx" && echo "FOUND: HeadlinesPageLayout.tsx" || echo "MISSING: HeadlinesPageLayout.tsx" && test -f "src/app/headlines/page.tsx" && echo "FOUND: headlines/page.tsx" || echo "MISSING: headlines/page.tsx" && test -f "src/components/headlines/HeadlinesTable.test.tsx" && echo "FOUND: Headline

cd C:/Code/MultiRotter && node ~/.claude/get-shit-done/bin/gsd-tools.cjs state add-decision --phase "06-headlines-page" --summary "toSortableDate() converts DD.MM.YY + HH:MM to YYMMDD HH:MM for lexicographic sort in HeadlinesTable" 2>&1 && node ~/.claude/get-shit-done/bin/gsd-tools.cjs state add-decision --phase "06-headlines-page" --summary "HeadlinesTable imported directly in page.tsx (not via barrel) to avoid client component boundary issues" 2>&1
cd C:/Code/MultiRotter && node ~/.claude/get-shit-done/bin/gsd-tools.cjs state record-session --stopped-at "Completed 06-02-PLAN.md: HeadlinesTable, HeadlinesPageLayout, and /headlines route" 2>&1
cd C:/Code/MultiRotter && node ~/.claude/get-shit-done/bin/gsd-tools.cjs requirements mark-complete HDLN-02 HDLN-04 2>&1

cd C:/Code/MultiRotter && git add .planning/phases/06-headlines-page/06-02-SUMMARY.md .planning/STATE.md .planning/ROADMAP.md && git commit --no-verify -m "docs(06-02): complete HeadlinesTable, HeadlinesPageLayout, and /headlines route plan

- HeadlinesTable: sort toggle, 4-column table, h1 title update
- HeadlinesPageLayout: 160px sidebar + main content two-column layout
- /headlines route with shared chrome and FORUM_SEED
- 38 headlines tests pass, next build succeeds
"

# Discovery check - merge per-plan files
PHASE_DIR="/c/Code/MultiRotter/.planning/phases/06-headlines-page"
DISCOVERED_FILE="${PHASE_DIR}/DISCOVERED.md"
for per_plan in "${PHASE_DIR}"/DISCOVERED-*.md; do
  [ -f "$per_plan" ] && { echo "" >> "${DISCOVERED_FILE}"; cat "$per_plan" >> "${DISCOVERED_FILE}"; rm "$per_plan"; echo "Merged: $per_plan"; }
done
[ -f "${DISCOVERED_FILE}" ] && grep -c "^## Issue:" "${DISCOVERED_FILE}" 2>/dev/null || echo "0 discovered issues"

# Quick build check
npx next build --webpack 2>&1 | tail -15
cd "C:/Code/MultiRotter" && grep -c "FORUM_SEED" src/data/forum-seed.ts 2>/dev/null && grep -c "export const FORUM_SEED" src/data/forum-seed.ts

# Commit completion artifacts
git add .planning/ROADMAP.md .planning/STATE.md .planning/phases/06-headlines-page/06-VERIFICATION.md && \
git commit --no-verify -m "docs(phase-06): complete phase execution — headlines page verified"

# Increment session counter
SESSION_COUNTER="/c/Code/MultiRotter/.planning/.autonomous-session-counter"
PHASES_EXECUTED=$(cat "$SESSION_COUNTER" 2>/dev/null || echo "0")
PHASES_EXECUTED=$((PHASES_EXECUTED + 1))
echo "$PHASES_EXECUTED" > "$SESSION_COUNTER"
echo "Phases executed this session: $PHASES_EXECUTED"
